items.title: Pacers star Haliburton diagnosed with shingles
items.description: Pacers point guard Tyrese Haliburton was diagnosed with shingles and will be away from the team for a few weeks, coach Rick Carlisle said Sunday.

items.title: LeBron stumps for C's Brown in MVP conversation
